name: SOX 404 / ICFR ITGC to SicarioSpec Evidence Map

framework.name: Sarbanes-Oxley Section 404 / Internal Control Over Financial Reporting

scope_note: SOX is not a cybersecurity control catalog. This starter map focuses on IT general controls and application controls that can support management assessment and auditor evidence for systems relevant to financial reporting.

control_area_mappings.purpose: Show that technology risks affecting financial reporting are governed, owned, reviewed, and evidenced.
Support least privilege, authorization, segregation of duties, privileged access review, and user lifecycle evidence.
Show that changes to financial applications, data pipelines, infrastructure, and control logic are authorized, tested, reviewed, and traceable.
Support job monitoring, alerting, backup, recovery, incident handling, and operational evidence for systems in ICFR scope.

control_area_mappings.area: Interface, report, and data integrity controls
control_area_mappings.purpose: Support completeness, accuracy, validity, and restricted modification of data moving into reports or financial processes.
Track reliance on vendors, SaaS platforms, SOC reports, shared responsibility, and compensating controls.
Keep exceptions time-bound, approved, remediated, and connected to evidence.
